# slopbrick Rule Catalog

**Total rules: 52** ‚Äî maintained in [`src/rules/builtins.ts`](../src/rules/builtins.ts) (auto-regenerated by [`scripts/generate-rule-registry.ts`](../scripts/generate-rule-registry.ts) on every build/test).

## Severity distribution

| Severity | Count |
|----------|------:|
| high     | 24 |
| medium   | 22 |
| low      | 6  |

## Category distribution

| Category | Count |
|----------|------:|
| arch       | 1 |
| component  | 3 |
| context    | 1 |

| logic      | 11 |
| perf       | 2 |

## `arch/` (1 rule)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `arch/astro-island-leak` | low | ‚úì | Astro component with click handler but no `client:*` directive |

## `component/` (3 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `component/giant-component` | high | ‚úì | Component file AST complexity exceeds threshold (triggers Context Window Tax) |
| `component/multiple-components-per-file` | medium | ‚úì | File contains 2+ component definitions ‚Äî split into separate files |
| `component/shadcn-prop-mismatch` | high | ‚úì | Component uses a shadcn primitive with non-standard prop shape |

## `context/` (1 rule)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `context/import-path-mismatch` | medium | ‚úì | Import path does not match any allowed prefix in `slopbrick.config.mjs` |

## `layout/` (4 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `layout/forced-layout` | medium | ‚úì | Inline style with explicit `width`/`height` instead of flex/grid |
| `layout/gap-monopoly` | medium | ‚Äî | All spacing between children via `gap`, ignoring margin/padding |
| `layout/math-element-uniformity` | medium | ‚Äî | Components use 1‚Äì2 distinct JSX element types excessively |
| `layout/math-grid-uniformity` | high | ‚Äî | All layouts collapse to the same grid structure |

## `logic/` (11 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `logic/boundary-violation` | high | ‚Äî | Server data layer imported into client-only file (or vice versa) |
| `logic/ghost-defensive` | medium | ‚Äî | Defensive code branches that can never execute |
| `logic/key-prop-missing` | medium | ‚Äî | List-rendering JSX without stable `key` prop |
| `logic/math-any-density` | medium | ‚Äî | High density of `any` types in a single file |
| `logic/math-console-log-storm` | high | ‚úì | Many `console.log` calls left in production code |
| `logic/math-gini-class-usage` | medium | ‚úì | Tailwind class string entropy is artificially low (Gini) |
| `logic/math-variable-name-entropy` | low | ‚Äî | Identifiers cluster around the same short names |
| `logic/optimistic-no-rollback` | high | ‚úì | Optimistic update without catch-rollback on error |
| `logic/qwik-hook-leak` | high | ‚úì | React hook used in Qwik component |
| `logic/reactive-hook-soup` | medium | ‚Äî | Many effects and handlers inlined in one component |
| `logic/zombie-state` | medium | ‚úì | `useState` declared but never read |

## `perf/` (2 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `perf/cls-image` | high | ‚úì | `<img>` without explicit width/height (CLS) |
| `perf/css-bloat` | medium | ‚Äî | CSS string exceeds threshold per file |

## `security/` (8 rules ‚Äî Tier-1 + Tier-2, AI Security Risk)

| Rule | Severity | Tier | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:----:|:-----------:|-------------|
| `security/hardcoded-secret` | high | 1 | ‚úì | String literal matching provider key prefix (`sk-`, `AKIA`, `ghp_`, ‚Ä¶) or sensitive-name literal |
| `security/exposed-env-var` | high | 1 | ‚úì | `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` / `VITE_*` / etc. with secret name ‚Äî inlined into every browser build |
| `security/dangerous-cors` | medium | 1 | ‚úì | Wildcard or reflective CORS (`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`, `cors({ origin: true })`) |
| `security/missing-auth-check` | medium | 1 | ‚Äî | Server route handler with no auth primitive in body |
| `security/unsafe-html-render` | high | 1 | ‚úì | `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` fed a non-literal value |
| `security/fail-open-auth` | high | 1 | ‚úì | Auth bypass returning true/next() on dev-env check |
| `security/sql-construction` | high | 2 | ‚úì | SQL query built with string concatenation or template interpolation |
| `security/public-admin-route` | medium | 2 | ‚Äî | Privileged route (path contains `/admin`, `/internal`, ‚Ä¶) without role/permission check |

## `typo/` (5 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `typo/calc-fontsize` | medium | ‚Äî | `font-size: calc(...)` instead of design token |
| `typo/calc-raw-px` | medium | ‚Äî | Raw `px` font-size instead of `rem` |
| `typo/clamp-offscale` | medium | ‚úì | `clamp()` range spans an unreasonable multiple |
| `typo/math-button-label-uniformity` | medium | ‚úì | Button labels cluster around 1‚Äì2 strings |
| `typo/math-cta-vocabulary` | medium | ‚úì | CTA vocabulary drift from declared patterns |

## `visual/` (13 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `visual/arbitrary-escape` | medium | ‚úì | Bracket-notation Tailwind values (`p-[13px]`, `text-[#7c3aed]`) |
| `visual/clamp-soup` | high | ‚úì | Inline `clamp()` with unreasonable min/max ratio |
| `visual/forced-layout` | medium | ‚úì | (see `layout/forced-layout`) |
| `visual/generic-centering` | medium | ‚úì | Generic centering pattern (`mx-auto`, `flex items-center justify-center`) repeated |
| `visual/inline-style-dominance` | medium | ‚Äî | Inline `style={{ ‚Ä¶ }}` dominates over token-driven class names |
| `visual/math-color-cluster` | medium | ‚Äî | Color usage clusters around 1‚Äì2 hex values |
| `visual/math-default-font` | medium | ‚Äî | Font-family defaults to Inter/system-fonts without fallback |
| `visual/math-font-entropy` | low | ‚Äî | Low font-family diversity across the codebase |
| `visual/math-gradient-hue-rotation` | medium | ‚Äî | Gradients cluster around violet/indigo/purple |
| `visual/math-rounded-entropy` | low | ‚Äî | Rounded values cluster (AI uses same `rounded-*` everywhere) |
| `visual/math-spacing-entropy` | low | ‚Äî | Spacing values cluster (AI uses same `p-*` everywhere) |
| `visual/radius-scale-violation` | medium | ‚Äî | `rounded-[Xpx]` off declared `radiusScale` |
| `visual/spacing-scale-violation` | medium | ‚Äî | `p-[Xpx]` off declared `spacingScale` |

## `wcag/` (4 rules)

| Rule | Severity | AI-specific | Description |
|------|----------|:-----------:|-------------|
| `wcag/dragging-movements` | medium | ‚Äî | Drag-only movement handler (no keyboard equivalent) |
| `wcag/focus-appearance` | high | ‚úì | `outline-none` without a replacement focus indicator |
| `wcag/focus-obscured` | medium | ‚Äî | Focus indicator hidden by sticky element |
| `wcag/target-size` | medium | ‚Äî | Interactive element below 24√ó24 px (WCAG 2.5.5) |

## Regenerating this catalog

This file is **manually maintained**. The authoritative source is [`src/rules/builtins.ts`](../src/rules/builtins.ts), regenerated automatically by `pnpm generate:rules` (runs before every `pnpm build` and `pnpm test`).

If you add a rule, regenerate the registry and update this file in the same commit. The CI will fail if the registry is stale.
